items.summary: Itron, Inc. has disclosed, via an 8-K filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), a cybersecurity incident in which an unauthorized third party accessed certain internal systems. [...]

items.title: Threat actor uses Microsoft Teams to deploy new “Snow” malware
items.summary: A threat group tracked as UNC6692 uses social engineering to deploy a new, custom malware suite named 'Snow' which includes a browser extension, a tunneler, and a backdoor. [...]

items.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a new Lua-based malware created years before the notorious Stuxnet worm that aimed to sabotage Iran's nuclear program by destroying uranium enrichment centrifuges. According to a new report…

items.title: ADT confirms data breach after ShinyHunters leak threat
items.summary: Home security giant ADT has confirmed a data breach after the ShinyHunters extortion group threatened to leak stolen data unless a ransom is paid. [...]

items.title: Helping Romance Scam Victims Require a Proactive, Empathic Approach
items.summary: People targeted by confidence schemes find getting help is a lonely road. Experts want law enforcement, financial and government institutions to work together and protect them.

items.title: Windows Update gets new controls to reduce forced restarts
items.summary: Microsoft is rolling out Windows Update improvements that give users more control over how updates are installed while reducing disruption from frequent or poorly timed restarts. [...]

items.title: US Busts Myanmar Ring Targeting US Citizens in Financial Fraud
items.summary: Some 29 people were charged, including a Cambodian senator, and authorities seized more than 500 Web domains tied to fake investment sites.

items.title: Glasswing Secured the Code. The Rest of Your Stack Is Still on You
